data.body:
[Mini Game Notice]

The mini game 'Climbing High! SRT-Style Bouldering' has been released!
Get tons of rewards while also having fun!

🗓️Event Schedule: 12/26 (Tue) 3:00 AM – 2024/1/9 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
➡️PLAY NOW: https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2023/12/minigame
